# AINative Studio Live

> The premier livestreaming platform for developers. Stream your IDE, build in public, and showcase AI-native development workflows in real-time.

## Features

- Live Coding Streams: Watch developers build in real-time with IDE streaming
- AI-Native Development: Showcasing multi-agent collaboration and AI-assisted workflows
- Live Chat: Real-time WebSocket chat during streams
- Categories: Web Dev, Mobile, AI/ML, DevOps, Game Dev, and more
- Video on Demand: Recorded streams available for replay
- Developer Profiles: Follow developers, see their stream history and social links
- Stream Analytics: Viewer counts, engagement metrics, geographic breakdowns
- Cloudflare Stream: HLS video powered by Cloudflare for low-latency playback

## For Streamers

- Go Live: Stream your IDE directly from the dashboard
- Schedule Streams: Plan and promote upcoming sessions
- Moderator Management: Assign channel moderators
- Analytics Dashboard: Track viewers, engagement, and growth

## Categories

- Web Development
- Mobile Development
- AI & Machine Learning
- DevOps & Infrastructure
- Game Development
- Open Source
- System Design
- Vibe Coding (AI-native flow state development)

## Links

- Platform: https://live.ainative.studio
- About: https://live.ainative.studio/about
- What is AI-Native Development: https://live.ainative.studio/vibe-coding
- Search Streams: https://live.ainative.studio/search
- Parent Platform: https://www.ainative.studio
- API: https://api.ainative.studio
